name: scDGRN Gene Regulatory Network Discovery
description: Dynamic gene regulatory network discovery from time-series single-cell transcriptomics data using scDGRN (Single-cell Dynamic Gene Regulatory Network) with GTransformer model. Supports h5ad format input with time information in obs metadata or layers. Supports automatic pseudo-time computation (DPT or PCA-based) and multiple segmentation methods: KMeans clustering, equal-width binning, equal-frequency binning, density-based binning, and Gaussian Mixture Model to segment cells into time points. Features comprehensive parameter validation and detailed error messages for better user experience.

top_percent.description: Top percentage threshold for selecting high-scoring regulatory edges

time_column.description: Column name in obs metadata containing time point information

pseudotime_method.description: Pseudo-time calculation method: 'none' to use existing time column, 'kmeans' for KMeans clustering with automatic cluster selection, 'equal_width' for equal-width binning, 'equal_frequency' for quantile-based binning, 'density' for density-based binning using KDE, 'gmm' for Gaussian Mixture Model clustering

pseudotime_column.description: Column name in obs containing pseudo-time values (used when pseudotime_method is not 'none')

max_clusters.description: Maximum number of clusters/components (for kmeans and gmm methods)

min_clusters.description: Minimum number of clusters/components (for kmeans and gmm methods)

n_bins.description: Number of bins/time points (for equal_width, equal_frequency, and density methods)

bandwidth.description: Bandwidth for KDE in density method (null/None for automatic selection)

compute_pseudotime.description: If True, automatically compute pseudo-time from data if not present in obs metadata

pseudotime_compute_method.description: Method to compute pseudo-time if not present: 'dpt' for Diffusion Pseudotime (DPT) using scanpy, 'pca_trajectory' for PCA-based trajectory inference

n_neighbors.description: Number of neighbors for DPT method (used when pseudotime_compute_method is 'dpt')

n_pcs.description: Number of principal components for DPT/PCA methods

time_order.description: Optional comma-separated string specifying the order of time points (e.g., 'E10.5,E12.5,E14.5' or 'Layer_1,Layer_2,Layer_3'). If None or empty, uses default sorting based on the time column values. All values must exist in the specified time_column.

species.description: Species selection: 'human' to use human training network (network_human.csv), 'mouse' to use mouse training network (network_mouse.csv). If not specified, uses random training data.

file.description: Time-series single-cell RNA-seq data in h5ad format. Time information should be in obs metadata column or in layers.

output_config.collection_description: Outputs dynamic gene regulatory network results, statistics, and network visualization graphs.

items.description: Merged GRN results for all time points with columns: TF, TF_name, Target, Target_name, score, time_point
Statistical analysis report with parameters, data statistics, and results summary

Combined network visualization graph showing gene regulatory interactions across all time points in subplot layout. Node size represents connectivity, color represents interaction score (light orange/yellow to dark red), and green outline indicates high-importance nodes.
